title: dystaenia takeshimana
intro: Dystaenia takeshimana, also known as Japanese angelica or Takeda angelica, is a type of perennial plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dystaenia takeshimana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Dystaenia takeshimana include teas, infusions, and dried roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
